nasb.text: The mountains will melt under Him And the valleys will be split, Like wax before the fire, Like water poured down a steep place.

esv.text: And the mountains will melt under him, and the valleys will split open, like wax before the fire, like waters poured down a steep place.

cnv.text: 群山在他腳下融化， 眾谷裂開， 如蠟在火前一般， 像水沖下斜坡一般，

ccb.text: 群山在祂脚下熔化， 犹如火中的蜡； 山谷崩裂， 岩石如水沿山坡倾泻。
